title: Upgrade oc-chatgpt-multi-auth@5.4.4 → oc-codex-multi-auth@6.1.8
summary: Upgrade the deprecated oc-chatgpt-multi-auth plugin to the renamed oc-codex-multi-auth, reconciling 5 local patches against upstream v6.1.8, configuring stream stall timeout, and validating OAuth accounts.
keyOutcomes: Stream stall timeout set to 120s via User environment variable
risks: OpenCode may not auto-install the new package name if registry lookup fails
All-call-types arguments fix not in upstream — could cause errors on rare call types
SSE raw-text fallback not in upstream — could cause silent failures on truncated streams
dependencies: User must restart OpenCode for plugin swap to take effect
deliverables: Stream stall timeout configured at 120s via User environment variable
validationCriteria: No debug writeFileSync calls in new plugin source
